behavior_summary: U8P_BONES2::look is the examine/U8P_BONES2::look handler for the item and simply emits the short description text 'skeleton'.

U8P_BONES2::use handles player 'U8P_BONES2::use' interactions on the same item: it reads the item's status (via Item::getStatus(this)) and tests bit 0x0100. If that bit is set the script closes the item's gump (Item::closeGump(this)) and returns.

If the 0x0100 bit is not set, U8P_BONES2::use performs a random roll (urandom(0x64)). On a rare outcome (roll > 0x5F) it barks 'Do not disturb my rest!' and stops further action; otherwise it opens UI gump 0x0C for the item (Item::openGump(0x0C, this)).
No global flags are read or written by these processes in the provided data.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BONES2::look: single linear action — emit bark 'skeleton' then suspend/terminate (confidence: high).
U8P_BONES2::use: primary guard — read Item::getStatus(this) into a local (local1) and test bit 0x0100; if set, call Item::closeGump(this) and exit (confidence: high).

U8P_BONES2::use: secondary branching — if status bit not set, compute urandom(0x64) and compare to threshold (0x5F). On the rare true branch bark 'Do not disturb my rest!' and suspend; on the common branch call Item::openGump(0x0C, this) (confidence: medium-high).
open_questions: What exact gameplay meaning is carried by the 0x0100 status bit on this item (inferred as a 'do not interact / locked' guard but not proven).
Is gump id 0x0C a standard interaction UI for this item type or a custom dialog specific to this object (inferred from Item::openGump usage).
The precise probability threshold used by the urandom comparison (numeric constants imply ~4%); confirmation would require the original numeric comparison semantics.

main_function.name: U8P_BONES2::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player examines the item (emit the single text 'skeleton').
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine's U8P_BONES2::look/examine action on this item (player inspects the object).

function_map.name: U8P_BONES2::use
function_map.role: player 'U8P_BONES2::use' interaction handler (status guard, rare bark, open UI gump)

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's status bitfield (result used to test bit 0x0100).
Close the item's UI gump when the status guard (0x0100) prevents interaction.
Produce a random value (0..0x63) to implement a low-probability alternate bark branch.
Open UI gump 0x0C for the item when interaction is allowed and the rare bark branch does not occur.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BONES2::look is the examine/U8P_BONES2::look handler for the item and simply emits the short description text 'skeleton'.
